"A destination that redefines Mediterranean living on Egypt's North Coast"

About Marassi

Egypt's Most Celebrated Coastal Village

Marassi Village is a masterpiece of coastal architecture on Egypt's North Coast, spanning over 1,544 acres of breathtaking Mediterranean landscape. Developed by Emaar Misr, inspired by the charm of Greek island villages.

With 14 kilometers of pristine beach, a thriving marina, championship golf, and Egypt's finest restaurants, Marassi is not merely a destination — it is a lifestyle, an experience, and a legacy.

Developed by Emaar Misr — World-Class Standards
Greek & Mediterranean architectural inspiration
1,544 acres of curated coastal paradise
Year-round luxury community & premium services
14km of pristine Mediterranean shoreline
MARASSI VILLAGE

Egypt's premier Mediterranean coastal village. Where luxury, nature, and architecture converge on the North Coast.

About This Villa

Verdi Villa TH 34 is a stunning twin-house in Marassi's prestigious Verdi district, offering breathtaking direct lagoon views. Featuring a spacious private garden, shaded pergola terrace, and sun loungers overlooking the crystal-blue lagoon. The ground floor opens into a bright double living room, a fully-equipped kitchen with green marble island, and a formal dining area. Upstairs, the master suite has a private balcony with panoramic lagoon views — perfect for sunset evenings. Comfortably sleeps 10 guests.
